_comment: Single source of truth for date-related signal phrases. Consumed by utils/datetools.py (deterministic post-processing) AND injected into the LLM extraction/parse prompts via utils/datekeywords.py, so both stages share the same vocabulary. Edit here to customize; no code change needed. Order matters for 'rentStart' (priority order).

rentStart.label: Rent commencement (distinct from lease start)
rentStart.hint: The date rent begins to accrue, which may differ from the lease commencement date (a rent-free period). Capture the date that follows these phrases.

leaseSpanStart.label: Lease span opener
leaseSpanStart.hint: The lease commencement date sits between/after these markers (e.g. 自<date>起).

leaseSpanEnd.label: Lease span terminator
leaseSpanEnd.hint: The lease end date sits before these markers (e.g. 至<date>止).

openEnded.label: Lease expiry (open-ended final period)
openEnded.hint: Marks a period that runs until lease expiry rather than a fixed end date.

relativePeriod.label: Relative payment periods (preserve verbatim)
relativePeriod.hint: Year-relative rate periods. Copy the exact phrase; downstream tools derive calendar dates from the lease/rent anchor.
